sharedParams.label: Binarize activity signal
sharedParams.description: Shared binarization setting for metrics that support binary active/inactive conversion.

sharedParams.label: Threshold
sharedParams.description: Threshold used when binarization is enabled.

sharedParams.description: Shared resampling frequency for metrics that support a frequency parameter.
